channel.title: GDPR on My New Hugo Project
channel.description: Recent content in GDPR on My New Hugo Project

item.title: Designing an Enterprise Data Classification Policy for Healthcare
item.description: In healthcare IT, data governance isn’t just a corporate checklist—it’s a legal shield and a foundational pillar of patient trust. Managing a mixture of Protected Health Information (PHI), financial metrics, and day-to-day internal communications requires a systematic approach.
